# Security Advisory: dangerous-triggers

This file was added by [sentinel](https://github.com/jpr5/sentinel) to raise awareness of a security issue in your GitHub Actions workflows.

## Findings

### auto-label.yml (line 12)

**Severity:** critical
**Message:** pull_request_target + checkout of PR head — fork code runs with base repo secrets
**Suggested fix:** Use pull_request trigger instead, or don't checkout PR head code


## How this was detected

This finding was identified by deterministic pattern matching — no AI or machine learning was used in the detection. Sentinel uses static analysis rules that match known-vulnerable YAML patterns against a database of documented exploit vectors. Every finding maps to a specific, reproducible pattern. [Source code](https://github.com/jpr5/sentinel) is open for inspection.

## What to do

1. Review the findings above
2. Apply the suggested fixes to your workflow files
3. Delete this file
4. Merge or close this PR
